content:
🌟 networking-toolbox | Svelte
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide system administrators with a comprehensive, self-hosted, and offline-capable suite of networking tools for diagnostics, analysis, and security.
✨ Key Features: • Offline-first functionality • 100+ networking tools and utilities • Self-hosted deployment options (Docker, Node, Static) • SvelteKit + TypeScript development stack
📖 Summary: Networking Toolbox is an offline-first, self-hosted web application providing over 100 essential networking tools and utilities for system administrators. Built with SvelteKit and TypeScript, it offers a comprehensive suite of diagnostic and analysis features accessible without an internet connection.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
